name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via PowerShell
notes:
This building block detects clearing of eventlogs using PowerShell.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Ecco, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, D3F7A5105
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Eventlog Clear or Configuration Change
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious reconnaissance command line activity on Windows systems using Net.EXE


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe]

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-eventlog %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remove-eventlog %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%limit-eventlog %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-winevent %') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Eventlog Cleared via PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [powershell.exe or pwsh.exe]

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-eventlog %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remove-eventlog %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%limit-eventlog %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-winevent %') AQL filter query
